productDisplayName: Timex Expedition Men White Dial Watch T49824
description: Article Number: T49824Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and stainless steel back, has a rotating bezel with markingDial style: White dial, has black and red hands with glow-in-the-dark inlays, silver toned seconds hand, black and grey markings and branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the time, three chronograph faces, date aperture on the dial, two push buttons to reset the chronograph displays, Indiglo night lightStrap style: Black leather strap, textured, has stitched detail and secured with a tang claspWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex Expedition caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
